positive: Stylized abstract geometric pattern featuring interconnected bioluminescent jellyfish and deep-sea coral formations. The composition is highly symmetrical, utilizing clean silhouettes of various marine life integrated into a repeating tessellation pattern. Dominant colors are electric sapphire blue, neon cyan, and bioluminescent magenta, contrasted against a deep midnight black background. The style is a blend of Art Deco geometry and ethereal bioluminescence, rendered with sharp vector lines, clean negative space, and a luminous glow effect. Centrally composed, optimized for apparel printing, emphasizing strong visual impact and repeatability. Perfect for textile art.
negative: blurry, noisy, low resolution, text, signature, watermark, extra limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, gradient, photo-realistic, low contrast, cartoon, writing, logos, brands, characters
